liquibase.hub

Interface HubService

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Plugin, PrioritizedService
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    MockHubService, StandardHubService

    public interface HubService
extends Plugin, PrioritizedService

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface liquibase.plugin.Plugin

        PRIORITY_DEFAULT, PRIORITY_NOT_APPLICABLE, PRIORITY_SPECIALIZED

      • Fields inherited from interface liquibase.servicelocator.PrioritizedService

        COMPARATOR, PRIORITY_DATABASE, PRIORITY_DEFAULT

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Project findProjectByConnectionIdOrJdbcUrl(UUID connectionId, String jdbcUrl)

      • shortenLink

        String shortenLink(String url)
            throws LiquibaseException
        Request to shorten a URL to create a more user-friendly link to the user
        Parameters:
        url - The link to shorten
        Returns:
        New url
        Throws:
        LiquibaseHubException - If shortening fails
        LiquibaseException
